description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet or shelf with a light oak finish. The structure features a thick top shelf supported by four metallic cylindrical legs, creating an open space beneath for storage or display. The lower section consists of two large drawers, each with a curved metallic handle, providing concealed storage. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a smooth, matte surface. The metallic accents add a contemporary touch, while the wood grain pattern is visible throughout the exterior. The back and sides are solid, and the object appears sturdy and well-constructed.
description: A light oak-finished wooden cabinet with two drawers and a raised top shelf supported by metallic legs, featuring curved metal handles and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid wood panel and the open shelf space above, with metallic supports visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the top shelf and the depth of the cabinet, with one metallic support visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two drawers with curved metal handles and the open shelf above, supported by metallic legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with a clear look at the side panel and metallic support.
